Message: Markup showcase compiles HTML/CSS into native DOM and binds C# code-behind.
Markup forms block shows required, pattern, password, and textarea validation surfaces from external HTML/CSS assets.
Markup appearance block shows backdrop blur, filter blur, flex wrap, RTL text, and image skin samples.
Markup selector and stack labs validate advanced selectors plus transformed z-index hit alignment.
Markup Phase 2 visual lab shows multi-background, multi-shadow, dashed border, mask, and clip-path in one native card.
Markup Phase 3 text lab shows multilingual copy, RTL alignment, ellipsis, and text decoration in one native panel.
Markup Phase 4 image lab shows CSS background-image url, inline SVG import, and native canvas binding in one panel.
Markup Phase 5 keyframe lab captures the initial animation state from external CSS files.
Markup keyframe lab advances to a deterministic mid-frame.
Markup Phase 5 keyframe lab shows mid-animation color, blur, and opacity interpolation.
Markup keyframe lab reaches the deterministic end frame.
Markup Phase 5 keyframe lab shows the finite animation end state and alternate fill behavior.
Markup transition probe enters focus state without JS.
Markup transition runtime advances native tween interpolation.
Markup transition probe shows mid-animation color and opacity interpolation.
Markup scroll host consumes native wheel input.
Markup scroll container clips content, updates offsets, and keeps clip host bounded.
Markup keeps collection selection on item 2 for the focused crop.
Markup table block shows native table semantics, content-aware columns, rowspan, and colspan.
Markup code-behind increments counter.
Markup counter rerender is visible after C# action.
Markup opens overlay from code-behind.
Markup overlay and diagnostics remain visible.
